items.title: S01E01 - Alias Smith and Jones
items.summary: Two non-violent bandits begin to feel the inroads of high technology and decide to try and earn a pardon from the Governor of Wyoming.

infolabels.title: Alias Smith and Jones
infolabels.plot: Two non-violent bandits begin to feel the inroads of high technology and decide to try and earn a pardon from the Governor of Wyoming.

items.title: S01E02 - The McCreedy Bust
items.summary: Smith and Jones become the pawns of two greedy ranchers who have a running feud about the ownership of a Roman bust.

infolabels.title: The McCreedy Bust
infolabels.plot: Smith and Jones become the pawns of two greedy ranchers who have a running feud about the ownership of a Roman bust.

items.title: S01E03 - Exit from Wickenburg
items.summary: Someone's trying to get the guys out of a town where they are helping a widow run from the saloon left to her by her late husband, but they can't figure out who's doing it or why.

infolabels.title: Exit from Wickenburg
infolabels.plot: Someone's trying to get the guys out of a town where they are helping a widow run from the saloon left to her by her late husband, but they can't figure out who's doing it or why.

items.title: S01E04 - Wrong Train to Brimstone
items.summary: Heyes and Curry gain passage on a train that is full of Bannerman detectives who are setting a trap for them and their gang

infolabels.title: Wrong Train to Brimstone
infolabels.plot: Heyes and Curry gain passage on a train that is full of Bannerman detectives who are setting a trap for them and their gang

items.title: S01E05 - The Girl in Boxcar #3
items.summary: Curry gets involved with a runaway girl riding the rails as he tries to deliver $50,000 to a town 400 miles away.

infolabels.title: The Girl in Boxcar #3
infolabels.plot: Curry gets involved with a runaway girl riding the rails as he tries to deliver $50,000 to a town 400 miles away.

items.title: S01E06 - The Great Shell Game
items.summary: Heyes seems to be reverting to his old thieving ways when he sets up a pretty young woman to lose $10,000 in a phony horse betting operation.

infolabels.title: The Great Shell Game
infolabels.plot: Heyes seems to be reverting to his old thieving ways when he sets up a pretty young woman to lose $10,000 in a phony horse betting operation.

items.title: S01E07 - Return to Devil's Hole
items.summary: An outlaw leader faces a dilemma; he must decide who is telling the truth, Heyes' lady friend or the man she's trying to kill.

infolabels.title: Return to Devil's Hole
infolabels.plot: An outlaw leader faces a dilemma; he must decide who is telling the truth, Heyes' lady friend or the man she's trying to kill.

items.title: S01E08 - A Fistful of Diamonds
items.summary: After an embezzling banker / murderer sets up Curry and Heyes to take the fall for his crimes, the boys try to clear themselves by playing on his greed with a salted diamond field.

infolabels.title: A Fistful of Diamonds
infolabels.plot: After an embezzling banker / murderer sets up Curry and Heyes to take the fall for his crimes, the boys try to clear themselves by playing on his greed with a salted diamond field.

items.title: S01E09 - Stagecoach Seven
items.summary: A stationmaster battles for his own interests against a band of outlaws.

infolabels.title: Stagecoach Seven
infolabels.plot: A stationmaster battles for his own interests against a band of outlaws.

items.title: S01E10 - The Man Who Murdered Himself
items.summary: While Curry drives a wagonload of dynamite across rugged country, Heyes hires on as a guide for two Englishmen searching for a tribe of giant redheaded Indians rumored to have lived in the area of Devil's Hole.

infolabels.title: The Man Who Murdered Himself
infolabels.plot: While Curry drives a wagonload of dynamite across rugged country, Heyes hires on as a guide for two Englishmen searching for a tribe of giant redheaded Indians rumored to have lived in the area of Devil's Hole.

items.title: S01E11 - The Root of It All
items.summary: Smith and Jones retrieve a letter for a young lady and wind up searching for a buried Army payroll.

infolabels.title: The Root of It All
infolabels.plot: Smith and Jones retrieve a letter for a young lady and wind up searching for a buried Army payroll.

items.title: S01E12 - The Fifth Victim
items.summary: The guys become involved with a friendly rancher in a not-so-friendly poker game.

infolabels.title: The Fifth Victim
infolabels.plot: The guys become involved with a friendly rancher in a not-so-friendly poker game.

items.title: S01E13 - Journey from San Juan
items.summary: Smith and Jones balance a Mexican bandit and pretty saloon owner while they gather a herd of wild cattle as a cover for other activities.

infolabels.title: Journey from San Juan
infolabels.plot: Smith and Jones balance a Mexican bandit and pretty saloon owner while they gather a herd of wild cattle as a cover for other activities.

items.title: S01E14 - Never Trust an Honest Man
items.summary: The boys return a fortune in jewels to a railroad magnate, who promptly sets a posse after them when he learns the gems are fake.

infolabels.title: Never Trust an Honest Man
infolabels.plot: The boys return a fortune in jewels to a railroad magnate, who promptly sets a posse after them when he learns the gems are fake.

items.title: S01E15 - The Legacy of Charlie O'Rourke
items.summary: A saloon entertainer and a special agent suspect that Heyes and Curry's interest in a condemned robber is the same as their own; a rumored fortune in stolen buried gold.

infolabels.title: The Legacy of Charlie O'Rourke
infolabels.plot: A saloon entertainer and a special agent suspect that Heyes and Curry's interest in a condemned robber is the same as their own; a rumored fortune in stolen buried gold.

items.title: S02E01 - The Day They Hanged Kid Curry (90 min.)
items.summary: Curry must clear his name when someone claiming to be Kid Curry admits to a murder charge and is scheduled for hanging.

infolabels.title: The Day They Hanged Kid Curry (90 min.)
infolabels.plot: Curry must clear his name when someone claiming to be Kid Curry admits to a murder charge and is scheduled for hanging.

items.title: S02E02 - How to Rob a Bank in One Hard Lesson
items.summary: Heyes and Curry meet up with an offbeat crook when they fall once gain for the old lady-in-distress gambit.

infolabels.title: How to Rob a Bank in One Hard Lesson
infolabels.plot: Heyes and Curry meet up with an offbeat crook when they fall once gain for the old lady-in-distress gambit.

items.title: S02E03 - Jailbreak at Junction City
items.summary: Curry and Heyes try to avoid a sheriff who is sure to recognize them.

infolabels.title: Jailbreak at Junction City
infolabels.plot: Curry and Heyes try to avoid a sheriff who is sure to recognize them.

items.title: S02E04 - Smiler with a Gun
items.summary: Heyes and the Kid meet two men at a carnival - one of them a gold digger, the other a fast-drawing cowboy with a big smile. The gold digger likes the three of them, and makes them an offer. If they come with him and work in his mine, they can share the gold between the four of them.

infolabels.title: Smiler with a Gun
infolabels.plot: Heyes and the Kid meet two men at a carnival - one of them a gold digger, the other a fast-drawing cowboy with a big smile. The gold digger likes the three of them, and makes them an offer. If they come with him and work in his mine, they can share the gold between the four of them.

items.title: S02E05 - The Posse That Wouldn't Quit
items.summary: After being chased for weeks by a posse, Heyes and the Kid hide out on a ranch where a nice but poor family lives. They become idols of sorts for the two daughters, and quickly learn to like all of them.

infolabels.title: The Posse That Wouldn't Quit
infolabels.plot: After being chased for weeks by a posse, Heyes and the Kid hide out on a ranch where a nice but poor family lives. They become idols of sorts for the two daughters, and quickly learn to like all of them.

items.title: S02E06 - Something to Get Hung About
items.summary: Heyes tries to talk a runaway wife into returning to her husband while Curry distracts the gentleman with her.

infolabels.title: Something to Get Hung About
infolabels.plot: Heyes tries to talk a runaway wife into returning to her husband while Curry distracts the gentleman with her.

items.title: S02E07 - Six Strangers at Apache Springs
items.summary: Smith and Jones meet an unlucky lady evangelist, a stubborn Indian agent, a devious woman, and a hotel keeper when they decide to spend time in the deserted town of Apache Springs while retrieving buried gold from hostile Indian lands.

infolabels.title: Six Strangers at Apache Springs
infolabels.plot: Smith and Jones meet an unlucky lady evangelist, a stubborn Indian agent, a devious woman, and a hotel keeper when they decide to spend time in the deserted town of Apache Springs while retrieving buried gold from hostile Indian lands.

items.title: S02E08 - Night of the Red Dog
items.summary: A group of men, among them Heyes and the Kid, witness an old man lose consciousness, because of all the gold he was carrying. A doctor says to the man that he is dying. The man then produces a map showing his mining concession, which he testaments to the group.

infolabels.title: Night of the Red Dog
infolabels.plot: A group of men, among them Heyes and the Kid, witness an old man lose consciousness, because of all the gold he was carrying. A doctor says to the man that he is dying. The man then produces a map showing his mining concession, which he testaments to the group.

items.title: S02E09 - The Reformation of Harry Briscoe
items.summary: After helping a pair of nuns whose wagon has broken down, Smith and Jones run into Harry Briscoe who claims one of the nuns is a fake who stole $30,000 from a bank she worked at.

infolabels.title: The Reformation of Harry Briscoe
infolabels.plot: After helping a pair of nuns whose wagon has broken down, Smith and Jones run into Harry Briscoe who claims one of the nuns is a fake who stole $30,000 from a bank she worked at.

items.title: S02E10 - Dreadful Sorry, Clementine
items.summary: The fellows get involved in a $50,000 swindle.

infolabels.title: Dreadful Sorry, Clementine
infolabels.plot: The fellows get involved in a $50,000 swindle.

items.title: S02E11 - Shootout at Diablo Station
items.summary: The passengers of a coach are taken hostage at Diablo Station by four cowboys. Not discussing their ultimate goal, they keep Heyes and the Kid and the others tied up, just waiting.

infolabels.title: Shootout at Diablo Station
infolabels.plot: The passengers of a coach are taken hostage at Diablo Station by four cowboys. Not discussing their ultimate goal, they keep Heyes and the Kid and the others tied up, just waiting.

items.title: S02E12 - The Bounty Hunter
items.summary: A black bounty hunter catches Heyes and Curry and hangs onto them even after they twice save his life from bigots determined to turn them in themselves.

infolabels.title: The Bounty Hunter
infolabels.plot: A black bounty hunter catches Heyes and Curry and hangs onto them even after they twice save his life from bigots determined to turn them in themselves.

items.title: S02E13 - Everything Else You Can Steal
items.summary: Tired and weary, Heyes and the Kid discover that they are accused of burgling a bank. They decide to go there and investigate, since their amnesty is at stake.

infolabels.title: Everything Else You Can Steal
infolabels.plot: Tired and weary, Heyes and the Kid discover that they are accused of burgling a bank. They decide to go there and investigate, since their amnesty is at stake.

items.title: S02E14 - Miracle at Santa Marta
items.summary: Kid Curry is again falsely accused of murder and it's up to Heyes to save the day.

infolabels.title: Miracle at Santa Marta
infolabels.plot: Kid Curry is again falsely accused of murder and it's up to Heyes to save the day.

items.title: S02E15 - 21 Days to Tenstrike
items.summary: The guys join a cattle drive and Kid Curry finds himself accused of murder again.

infolabels.title: 21 Days to Tenstrike
infolabels.plot: The guys join a cattle drive and Kid Curry finds himself accused of murder again.

items.title: S02E16 - The McCreedy Bust: Going, Going, Gone!
items.summary: ""Big Mac"" MacCreedy tries to get the boys to steal the Roman bust from Armendariz - again, but this time the boys refuse. But when Big Mac threatens to reveal their secret identities they agree to transport the bust to an auction after it has been stolen.

infolabels.title: The McCreedy Bust: Going, Going, Gone!
infolabels.plot: ""Big Mac"" MacCreedy tries to get the boys to steal the Roman bust from Armendariz - again, but this time the boys refuse. But when Big Mac threatens to reveal their secret identities they agree to transport the bust to an auction after it has been stolen.

items.title: S02E17 - The Man Who Broke the Bank at Red Gap
items.summary: The guys are framed for bank robbery by an embezzling banker, but they turn the tables on him by arranging for a second bank robbery to clear their names.

infolabels.title: The Man Who Broke the Bank at Red Gap
infolabels.plot: The guys are framed for bank robbery by an embezzling banker, but they turn the tables on him by arranging for a second bank robbery to clear their names.

items.title: S02E18 - The Men That Corrupted Hadleyburg
items.summary: The capture of Heyes and Curry represents pay dirt for a poor prospector and his family.

infolabels.title: The Men That Corrupted Hadleyburg
infolabels.plot: The capture of Heyes and Curry represents pay dirt for a poor prospector and his family.

items.title: S02E19 - The Biggest Game in the West
items.summary: When a bag of counterfeit money fall into the hands of Heyes and the Kid, they use it as collateral to get into the biggest poker game in the west.

infolabels.title: The Biggest Game in the West
infolabels.plot: When a bag of counterfeit money fall into the hands of Heyes and the Kid, they use it as collateral to get into the biggest poker game in the west.

items.title: S02E20 - Which Way to the OK Corral?
items.summary: Curry and Heyes sneak into Tombstone looking for a witness who could clear Big Mac McCreedy of a murder charge while trying to escape the notice of sheriff Wyatt Earp.

infolabels.title: Which Way to the OK Corral?
infolabels.plot: Curry and Heyes sneak into Tombstone looking for a witness who could clear Big Mac McCreedy of a murder charge while trying to escape the notice of sheriff Wyatt Earp.

items.title: S02E21 - Don't Get Mad, Get Even
items.summary: When Heyes loses his money to a crooked dealer, he threatens to expose the whole thing. But the owner of the casino calls the bluff, and Heyes and the Kid have to leave with their tails between their legs.

infolabels.title: Don't Get Mad, Get Even
infolabels.plot: When Heyes loses his money to a crooked dealer, he threatens to expose the whole thing. But the owner of the casino calls the bluff, and Heyes and the Kid have to leave with their tails between their legs.

items.title: S02E22 - What's in It for Mia?
items.summary: A female casino owner runs a crooked game, and nearly kills Heyes and the Kid for trying to point that out. They wind up in the care of a man and his daughter.

infolabels.title: What's in It for Mia?
infolabels.plot: A female casino owner runs a crooked game, and nearly kills Heyes and the Kid for trying to point that out. They wind up in the care of a man and his daughter.

items.title: S02E23 - Bad Night in Big Butte
items.summary: Heyes and the Kid tracks friend Georgette to borrow some money for a high stakes poker game, but finds that George has plans of her own.

infolabels.title: Bad Night in Big Butte
infolabels.plot: Heyes and the Kid tracks friend Georgette to borrow some money for a high stakes poker game, but finds that George has plans of her own.

items.title: S03E01 - The Long Chase
items.summary: A farmer spots the two boys and alerts the sheriff, but Heyes and the Kid jumps on a train and manage to get away. On the train they meet Harry Briscoe, who's now fired from Bannerman Detectives Inc. But when the posse telegraphs ahead, Heyes quickly reinstates Harry - and the boys become his prisoners.

infolabels.title: The Long Chase
infolabels.plot: A farmer spots the two boys and alerts the sheriff, but Heyes and the Kid jumps on a train and manage to get away. On the train they meet Harry Briscoe, who's now fired from Bannerman Detectives Inc. But when the posse telegraphs ahead, Heyes quickly reinstates Harry - and the boys become his prisoners.

items.title: S03E02 - High Lonesome Country
items.summary: The boys are hired by a ranch owner as trappers, but when they meet his wife, she recognizes the Kid. The ranch owner and his wife tries to act natural, and sends Heyes and the Kid out into the hills trapping. But they also send a professional hunter after them.

infolabels.title: High Lonesome Country
infolabels.plot: The boys are hired by a ranch owner as trappers, but when they meet his wife, she recognizes the Kid. The ranch owner and his wife tries to act natural, and sends Heyes and the Kid out into the hills trapping. But they also send a professional hunter after them.

items.title: S03E03 - The McCreedy Feud
items.summary: Heyes and the Kid have been promised $500 if they arrange a meeting between ""Big Mac"" MacCreedy and his longtime competitor, Armendariz, in order to end the feud. Instead they are captured by Armendariz' men and driven off his land.

infolabels.title: The McCreedy Feud
infolabels.plot: Heyes and the Kid have been promised $500 if they arrange a meeting between ""Big Mac"" MacCreedy and his longtime competitor, Armendariz, in order to end the feud. Instead they are captured by Armendariz' men and driven off his land.

items.title: S03E04 - The Clementine Incident
items.summary: With McCreedy's $5000 and ready to go to Santa Marta, the boys turn back to Texas, to get their friend Clementine. When they get there, they decide that it would arouse less suspicion if one of them were married. A game of poker seals the Kid's fate, but before they can leave, they are shot at.

infolabels.title: The Clementine Incident
infolabels.plot: With McCreedy's $5000 and ready to go to Santa Marta, the boys turn back to Texas, to get their friend Clementine. When they get there, they decide that it would arouse less suspicion if one of them were married. A game of poker seals the Kid's fate, but before they can leave, they are shot at.

items.title: S03E05 - Bushwack!
items.summary: Heyes and Curry are set up as witnesses for a man who kills two bushwhackers for his own reasons.

infolabels.title: Bushwack!
infolabels.plot: Heyes and Curry are set up as witnesses for a man who kills two bushwhackers for his own reasons.

items.title: S03E06 - What Happened at the XST?
items.summary: The boys are waiting for an old friend who wants a favour, in a small town called Buffalo. But while they wait they cross paths with two deputies who don't seem to want them there. That is, until Heyes and the Kid discovers that it's all on the sheriff's orders. The reason he doesn't want them there is that they can blow his cover, being an ex-criminal gone good.

infolabels.title: What Happened at the XST?
infolabels.plot: The boys are waiting for an old friend who wants a favour, in a small town called Buffalo. But while they wait they cross paths with two deputies who don't seem to want them there. That is, until Heyes and the Kid discovers that it's all on the sheriff's orders. The reason he doesn't want them there is that they can blow his cover, being an ex-criminal gone good.

items.title: S03E07 - The Ten Days That Shook Kid Curry
items.summary: When the Kid travels alone and seems destined to be thrown in jail for not having enough money to pay for his drink, a mild-mannered female teacher rescues him. But as he tries to return the favour, the Kid is kidnapped.

infolabels.title: The Ten Days That Shook Kid Curry
infolabels.plot: When the Kid travels alone and seems destined to be thrown in jail for not having enough money to pay for his drink, a mild-mannered female teacher rescues him. But as he tries to return the favour, the Kid is kidnapped.

items.title: S03E08 - The Day the Amnesty Came Through
items.summary: After nearly three years of staying out of trouble, for the sake of the amnesty, it's finally time. But when Heyes and the Kid meet sheriff Trevors, they find out that the governor has been removed from office.

infolabels.title: The Day the Amnesty Came Through
infolabels.plot: After nearly three years of staying out of trouble, for the sake of the amnesty, it's finally time. But when Heyes and the Kid meet sheriff Trevors, they find out that the governor has been removed from office.

items.title: S03E09 - The Strange Fate of Conrad Meyer Zulick
items.summary: After the Kid wins another duel (over a man who claimed the Kid was cheating), the boys are contacted and offered a job by a man called ""Doc"" Donovan. They are to come with him into Mexico, to rescue a hostage from Mexicans who only want their rightful money.

infolabels.title: The Strange Fate of Conrad Meyer Zulick
infolabels.plot: After the Kid wins another duel (over a man who claimed the Kid was cheating), the boys are contacted and offered a job by a man called ""Doc"" Donovan. They are to come with him into Mexico, to rescue a hostage from Mexicans who only want their rightful money.

items.title: S03E10 - McGuffin
items.summary: Confusion reigns after Smith and Jones stop to help a wounded man who calls himself McGuffin and asks them to deliver a package of perfect counterfeit $20 plates for him.

infolabels.title: McGuffin
infolabels.plot: Confusion reigns after Smith and Jones stop to help a wounded man who calls himself McGuffin and asks them to deliver a package of perfect counterfeit $20 plates for him.

items.title: S03E11 - Witness to a Lynching
items.summary: "Witness to a Lynching" is the 49th episode of Alias Smith and Jones.

infolabels.title: Witness to a Lynching
infolabels.plot: "Witness to a Lynching" is the 49th episode of Alias Smith and Jones.

items.title: S03E12 - Only Three to a Bed
items.summary: The boys accept the offer of a vacation - but doesn't realize that the activities during this vacation involves catching and taming wild horses.

infolabels.title: Only Three to a Bed
infolabels.plot: The boys accept the offer of a vacation - but doesn't realize that the activities during this vacation involves catching and taming wild horses.
